metadata.title: ChatGPT Image 2 Generator
metadata.description: Generate and edit images with ChatGPT Image 2 using text prompts and reference images.

page.title: ChatGPT Image 2 Generator
page.description: Create and refine visuals with ChatGPT Image 2 for text-to-image and image-to-image workflows.

generator.title: ChatGPT Image 2 Generator
generator.description: Use ChatGPT Image 2 for high-quality image generation and editing with strong prompt control.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the image in detail, including composition, text, lighting, materials, and any edits you want.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload one or more reference images to preserve style, layout, or subject details
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content
